title: status.to_string() alloc every frame
description: main.rs:98 calls self.state.status.to_string() unconditionally every frame. ConnectionStatus::to_string() allocates a new heap String each call via the Display impl. At 60 fps this is 60 allocs/sec for a value that changes at most once per network event. Fix: cache the rendered string in AppState alongside status, updated only in apply_event(StatusChanged).
